latest.title: Obesity cases rising fastest in young adults
latest.summary: Experts say the cost of living, pandemic and boom in unhealthy food are behind the rise in cases.

radar.title: Trump accuses big oil firms of price-gouging drivers
radar.summary: The president's remarks come as global oil prices have fallen but remain higher than before the US-Israel war with Iran.

radar.title: South Korea’s IPO bust clouds equity markets as Chaebol structure restrains listings
radar.summary: South Korea's IPO activity has lagged that of its regional peers as the structure of the market and governance reforms collide.

radar.title: GTA 6 will cost £70 - and physical edition will not contain a disc
radar.summary: Rockstar has said physical copies of the game will contain a code for a digital download for the game.

radar.title: The legal fight to get equal pay for Germany's disabled workers
radar.summary: A test case is seeking the minimum wage for 300,000 disabled people who currently get paid less.
